fields.name: ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the direct-debit mandate.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer that the direct-debit mandate is activated for.

fields.name: Customer Bank Account Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies customer bank account that the direct-debit mandate is activated for.

fields.name: Valid From
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the direct-debit mandate starts.

fields.name: Valid To
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the direct-debit mandate ends.

fields.name: Date of Signature
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the direct-debit mandate was signed by the customer.

fields.name: Type of Payment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the direct-debit transaction is the first or the last according to the expected number of direct-debit transactions that you entered in the Expected Number of Debits field.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Expected Number of Debits
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many direct-debit transactions you expect to perform using the direct-debit mandate. This field is used to calculate when to enter First or Last in the Sequence Type field in the Direct Debit Collect. Entries window.

fields.name: Debit Counter
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many direct-debit transactions have been performed using the direct-debit mandate.

fields.name: Closed
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the direct-debit mandate is closed, for example because the date in the Valid To field has been exceeded.

fields.name: Ignore Exp. Number of Debits
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the direct-debit mandate will not be closed automatically when the debit counter reaches the expected number of debits.
